backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Surah and Verse types with sample data for Al-Fatiha, exposing query functions getSurahs() and getVersesBySurah() to retrieve Quran content.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: home page with surah list, clickable navigation, surah reading page, Arabic text styling with RTL support, and reverent visual theme design.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing routing, data fetching hooks, page components, UI components for surahs and verses, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with neutral backgrounds and muted accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Quran app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home page and surah reading page, wrapped in ThemeProvider with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/SurahCard.tsx: Card component displaying surah metadata (number, Arabic name, transliteration, translation, verse count, revelation type) with hover effects and click navigation to reading page.
frontend/src/components/VerseDisplay.tsx: Card component rendering individual verses with verse number badge, RTL Arabic text, and English translation separated by a border.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks useGetSurahs() and useGetVersesBySurah() for fetching Quran data from the backend actor with proper dependency management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Amiri, Lora, Inter), configures Tailwind CSS, and defines custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space with warm cream/deep green palette, plus utility classes for Arabic text styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that displays a header with Quran title and a scrollable list of all 114 surahs using the useGetSurahs hook, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/SurahReadingPage.tsx: Surah reading page component that displays a specific surah's metadata and all its verses using route parameters, with navigation back to home and scrollable verse display.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, custom border radius variables, font families (Inter, Lora, Amiri), and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting completed frontend features (home page, surah list, reading page, Arabic styling, visual theme) and pending backend features (data models for surahs/verses and query functions).
